name: Scallops Fenton
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the white wine and lemon juice to a boil in a large saucepan. Add scallops, mushrooms, and green pepper. Simmer just until scallops are tender. Be careful not to overcook.
2. Drain the mixture, reserving the liquid.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in salt, pepper, and flour until bubbly.
4. Gradually stir in the reserved liquid. Cook until thickened.
5. Add Swiss cheese and half of the Romano cheese. Stir over very low heat until blended.
6. Remove from heat. Fold in whipped cream.
7. Stir in the scallop mixture.
8. Divide between eight individual buttered scallop shells or baking dishes.
9. Sprinkle tops with remaining Romano, dot with butter, and sprinkle with paprika.
10. Broil until golden brown. Watch carefully to avoid burning.
